notes: Slots 1-80 are public or public-workspace flagships.
Slots 81-90 are the 10 Pro control apps.
Slots 91-100 are the 10 Daily OS Pro apps.
Only AfroPayroll is truly active/account-backed in the Pro set; other Pro routes are local shells or limited previews unless their data layer is verified.

apps.name: Scholarship Finder
apps.focus: Education flagship workflow for a real user job.
apps.ten_minute_improvement: Add a first-screen next-deadline strip with source date and save action.
apps.youtube_angle: How to find African scholarships without missing deadlines
apps.competitors: Scholarship portals, exam prep sites, school platforms
apps.missing_gap: Needs stronger source freshness, saved profiles, reminders and school partner paths.
apps.validation: Route smoke, mobile overflow, console check, npm run audit, npm run check-links, and focused workflow checks.

apps.name: Import Duty Calculator
apps.focus: Trade and transport flagship workflow for a real user job.
apps.ten_minute_improvement: Add three common import presets and a one-click export summary.
apps.youtube_angle: How much will this imported car or product really cost?
apps.competitors: Customs brokers, duty calculators, logistics marketplaces
apps.missing_gap: Needs visible official-source dates and exportable landed-cost packets.
apps.validation: Route smoke, mobile overflow, console check, npm run audit, npm run check-links, and focused workflow checks.

competitor_sources.signal: Broad PDF suite: merge, split, compress, convert, edit, security and intelligence tools.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: PDF Workspace must sell privacy, workflow repeatability, bulk actions and export proof.

competitor_sources.signal: Combines docs, email, sheets, whiteboards, presentations, social media, video, websites and print.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: Creator and image apps need templates, brand continuity, multi-format export and tutorial content.

competitor_sources.signal: Connects in-store, online orders, payments, inventory and customer relationships.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroSeller needs honest local-first workflow now, then payment, inventory sync and hosted storefront later.

competitor_sources.signal: One-app business operations with store, staff actions, sales, inventory and analytics dashboard.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroSeller should be WhatsApp-native but still needs inventory, orders, analytics and payments to compete.

competitor_sources.signal: Automated bookkeeping, expense categorization, deductions and insights.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroBooks needs bank/transaction sync, reconciliation, reports and accountant workflow before calling itself active.

competitor_sources.signal: Dashboard, invoices, bills, fixed assets, mobile accounting and payments.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: Books should graduate from local records to repeatable month-close and accountant collaboration.

competitor_sources.signal: Time off, time tracking, approvals, timesheets, geolocation, overtime, payroll sync and reports.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroHR needs approvals, employee self-service and payroll handoff before broad promotion.

competitor_sources.signal: Hire, pay and manage teams across 150+ countries with payroll, compliance and HR operations.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroPayroll wins by African local depth, but must avoid global-compliance overclaims until verified.

competitor_sources.signal: Digitizes electronic medical records, hospital operations, billing, pharmacy, labs and planning.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: Clinic Desk must stay administrative until secure EMR, billing and compliance foundations exist.

competitor_sources.signal: Unified system for customers, employees, finances and operations.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: AfroTools Pro needs shared workspace, vault, team, settings and app-to-app data boundaries.

competitor_sources.signal: Ticket pages, ticket types, AI event creation, secure payments, payouts and embedded checkout.
competitor_sources.afrotools_implication: Events OS is useful for ceremony ops now, but ticketing, payments and check-in are the competitive gaps.

ten_minute_improvements.change: Feature 10 flagship apps above the long-tail directory so visitors see the strategic program immediately.
ten_minute_improvements.status: Done in this pass on index.html.

ten_minute_improvements.change: Use the JSON record to add a Flagship 100 badge on tool cards and all-tools filters.
Each app has a video angle in the workbook for the first 30 video scripts.
Data-heavy apps should show source date and stale/fallback state near the result.
Sensitive tools need sample fixtures so users can see value before pasting private data.
ten_minute_improvements.status: High leverage for CV, cover letter, medical report and PDF chat.

ten_minute_improvements.change: Every flagship workflow should have copy, PDF, TXT, CSV, JSON or handoff export where useful.
ten_minute_improvements.status: High leverage for ads and Pro conversion.

ten_minute_improvements.change: Country-sensitive apps should have a country selector before generic copy.
High-intent money and trade apps should route to widgets, API, sponsored tools or business enquiry with source context.
Run a 360px smoke on every app promoted in ads or YouTube.
One sentence should say local-only, source-backed, estimate-only or account-backed.
Creator, legal, business, education and PDF apps should expose 3-5 starter templates.
After a result, route to the next app: salary to payslip, car price to import cost, solar to generator.
Each flagship app needs a fresh card or banner image for ads and YouTube thumbnails.
Keep payment, WhatsApp, bank sync, official filing and cloud sync labels honest.
Every flagship app should track one north-star action, not just page views.
